name: mumo
description: Multi-model deliberation panel — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, Qwen, Kimi, GLM via mumo's MCP server.
author: mumo

interface.longDescription: When your local agent is decision-bound by its backbone model's confidence, mumo gives it on-demand access to a panel of frontier models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, Qwen, Kimi, GLM — for the hard calls. Useful for contested architecture decisions, design review, pre-launch pressure tests, and any time the cost of being wrong exceeds the cost of deliberation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Ask mumo to compare the tradeoffs and tell me where the panel disagrees.
